## Simple Table

| Name    | Age | City     |
|---------|-----|----------|
| Alice   | 30  | New York |
| Bob     | 25  | London   |
| Charlie | 35  | Tokyo    |

## Table with Alignment

| Left     | Center   | Right    |
|:---------|:--------:|---------:|
| left 1   | center 1 | right 1  |
| left 2   | center 2 | right 2  |

## Table with Inline Formatting

| Feature     | Status       | Notes                     |
|-------------|-------------|---------------------------|
| **Bold**    | ✅ Supported | Works in cells            |
| *Italic*    | ✅ Supported | Also works                |
| `Code`      | ✅ Supported | Inline code in tables     |
| ~~Strike~~  | ⚠️ Partial   | May vary                  |

## Wide Table

| Col1 | Col2 | Col3 | Col4 | Col5 | Col6 | Col7 | Col8 |
|------|------|------|------|------|------|------|------|
| a1   | b1   | c1   | d1   | e1   | f1   | g1   | h1   |
| a2   | b2   | c2   | d2   | e2   | f2   | g2   | h2   |
